seoTitle: Canley Heights vs Canley Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Canley Heights and Canley Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Canley Heights vs Canley Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Canley Heights and Canley Vale.
heading: Canley Heights vs Canley Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Canley Heights, New South Wales and Canley Vale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Canley Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Canley Vale (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Canley Heights or Canley Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Canley Heights has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Canley Vale scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Canley Heights scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Canley Vale scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Canley Heights or Canley Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Canley Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
